About Me

Engineering is not just my job —
it's my obsession and craft.

With 8+ years of remote delivery for enterprises across Canada, Finland, Ireland, the UK, and the Middle East, I've built everything from FoodTech SaaS platforms and IoT data pipelines to regulated banking portals and AI agent orchestration systems.

My philosophy: full-cycle ownership. I take requirements from whiteboard to production without handoff gaps. I'm equally comfortable architecting a greenfield system or modernizing legacy code. I adapt to any stack because curiosity and learning are core to how I work — not just buzzwords on a resume.

work highlights

Real products. Real clients. Real impact across five countries and six industries.

FoodTech · SaaS · Finland

Eetify — Restaurant OS

All-in-one restaurant management platform serving multi-branch operations in Finland. Built the complete admin portal, real-time Kitchen Display System, order pipeline, and analytics dashboard.

  • Real-time KDS: New → In Kitchen → Ready → Completed pipeline
  • Multi-branch menu management and order placement portal
  • Custom analytics: YDA, weekly, monthly & date-range views
  • AWS serverless deployment for zero-downtime auto-scaling
